title.en: WEIGHING (sorting by weighing B07C5/16)
Weighing apparatus involving the use of a counterweight or other counterbalancing mass
Pendulum-weight apparatus
Balances involving the use of a pivoted beam, i.e. beam balances
Weighing apparatus characterised by the use of elastically-deformable members, e.g. spring balances
wherein the weighing element is in the form of a helical spring
wherein the weighing element is in the form of a spiral spring
wherein the weighing element is in the form of a leaf spring
wherein the torsional deformation of a weighing element is measured
wherein the weighing element is in the form of a solid body stressed by pressure or tension during weighing
Temperature-compensating arrangements
Weighing apparatus wherein the balancing is effected by fluid action
{load-cell construction or mountings}
{with pneumatic means}
with a float or other member variably immersed in liquid
with means for measuring the pressure imposed by the load on a liquid (pressure gauges per se G01L)
Weighing apparatus wherein the balancing is effected by magnetic, electromagnetic, or electrostatic action, or by means not provided for in the preceding groups
by electromagnetic action
by electrostatic action
Methods of, or apparatus for, the determination of weight, not provided for in groups G01G1/00 - G01G7/00
{using radiations, e.g. radioactive (analysing materials by the use of wave or particle radiation G01N23/00)}
Apparatus for weighing a continuous stream of material during flow; Conveyor belt weighers
{Details; specially adapted accessories (details of weighing apparatus in general G01G21/00; auxiliary devices for weighing apparatus in general G01G23/00)}
{Special taring or checking devices therefor (devices for determining tare weight in general G01G23/14)}
having mechanical weight-sensitive devices
having electrical weight-sensitive devices
having fluid weight-sensitive devices
having means for controlling the rate of feed or discharge (regulation of flow of fluent material G05D)
using totalising or integrating devices ({G01G11/025, G01G11/043, G01G11/046 and G01G11/065 take precedence} totalising or integrating devices per se G06)

Weighing apparatus with automatic feed or discharge for weighing-out batches of material (for weighing a continuous stream G01G11/00; check-weighing G01G15/00; for fluids G01G17/04; apportioning by weight materials to be mixed G01G19/22; combinatorial weighing G01G19/387)
{Details; specially adapted accessories (details of weighing apparatus in general G01G21/00; auxiliary devices for weighing apparatus in general G01G23/00)}
Means for automatically loading weigh pans or other receptacles, e.g. disposable containers, under control of the weighing mechanism
Means for automatically discharging weigh receptacles under control of the weighing mechanism
Weighing mechanism control arrangements for automatic feed or discharge
Arrangements for check-weighing of materials dispensed into removable containers (packaging aspects B65B; {electric measuring arrangements involving comparison with a reference value G01R17/00})
{Volumetric pre-dispensing to an estimated weight; Gravimetric make-up device for target device}
{using electrical, electromechanical, or electronic means not covered by G01G15/001, G01G15/02, G01G15/04}
with provision for adding or removing a make-up quantity of material to obtain the desired net weight (dribble-feed means for automatic batch-weighers G01G13/04)
with provision for adding or removing a make-up quantity of material to obtain the desired gross weight (dribble-feed means for automatic batch-weighers G01G13/04)
Apparatus for or methods of weighing material of special form or property (determining weight by measuring volume G01F)
for weighing material of filamentary or sheet form
for weighing fluids, e.g. gases, pastes
for weighing livestock
Weighing apparatus or methods adapted for special purposes not provided for in the preceding groups {(electric measuring arrangements involving comparison with a reference value G01R17/00)}
{for postal parcels and letters}
{fractioning a determined weight of material in several equal parts}
for weighing wheeled or rolling bodies, e.g. vehicles
for incorporation in vehicles
for weighing suspended loads (G01G3/00 takes precedence; incorporation of weighing devices in cranes B66C1/40, B66C13/16)
for apportioning materials by weighing prior to mixing them (ratio regulation G05D11/00)
for combinatorial weighing, i.e. selecting a combination of articles whose total weight or number is closest to a desired value

with provisions for indicating, recording, or computing price or other quantities dependent on the weight (indicating means for weighing apparatus G01G23/18; recording means for weighing apparatus G01G23/18; computers in general G06)
for weighing persons
Weighing apparatus combined with other objects, e.g. furniture (with walking sticks A45B3/08)
Over or under weighing apparatus
Percentage-indicating weighing apparatus, i.e. for expressing the weight as a percentage of a predetermined or initial weight
Details of weighing apparatus
Arrangements of bearings (bearings per se F16C)
Beams
Link connections between the beam and the weigh pan
Weigh pans or other weighing receptacles; Weighing platforms
Support or suspension of weighing platforms (G01G21/24 takes precedence)
Guides or linkages for ensuring parallel motion of the weigh-pans
Counterweights; Poise-weights; Sets of weights; Holders for the reception of weights
Frames, Housings
Means for preventing contamination by dust
Auxiliary devices for weighing apparatus
{Means for correcting for obliquity of mounting (for pendulum-weight apparatus G01G1/16)}
{Means for preventing overload}
{Integrated arrangements for generating electrical power, e.g. solar cells}
Testing or calibrating of weighing apparatus
Relieving mechanisms; Arrestment mechanisms
Means for damping oscillations, e.g. of weigh beams
Devices for determining tare weight or for cancelling out the tare by zeroising, e.g. mechanically operated (in connection with automatic loading G01G13/14)
Indicating devices, e.g. for remote indication; Recording devices; Scales, e.g. graduated
Temperature-compensating arrangements (G01G1/14, G01G1/42, G01G3/18 take precedence)
